name: RailTel Corporation of India L
summary: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd. is a Mini Ratna (Category-I) PSU, one of the largest neutral telecom infrastructure providers in the country owning a pan-India optic fiber network on exclusive Right of Way (RoW) along railway tracks. The company provides a broad portfolio of telecom services and ICT solutions to various sectors including railways, telecom operators, government, and enterprises. RailTel is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
